from fastapi import FastAPI
from pydantic import BaseModel

app = FastAPI()


class UserSummary(BaseModel):
    name: str
    role: str
    avatar: str


class DashboardStats(BaseModel):
    total_orders: int
    pending_orders: int
    total_revenue: float
    average_order_value: float
    top_product: str
    conversion_rate: float


class Notification(BaseModel):
    id: int
    type: str
    message: str


class DashboardSettings(BaseModel):
    theme: str
    language: str
    timezone: str
    currency: str


class DashboardResponse(BaseModel):
    user: UserSummary
    stats: DashboardStats
    notifications: list[Notification]
    settings: DashboardSettings


@app.get("/dashboard", response_model=DashboardResponse)
async def get_dashboard():
    return DashboardResponse(
        user=UserSummary(name="Alice", role="admin", avatar="/img/alice.png"),
        stats=DashboardStats(
            total_orders=1234,
            pending_orders=56,
            total_revenue=98765.43,
            average_order_value=80.05,
            top_product="Widget Pro",
            conversion_rate=0.032,
        ),
        notifications=[
            Notification(id=1, type="info", message="New feature available"),
            Notification(id=2, type="warning", message="Low stock alert"),
            Notification(id=3, type="success", message="Order shipped"),
        ],
        settings=DashboardSettings(theme="dark", language="en", timezone="UTC", currency="USD"),
    )
